title: Enhance GUI Configuration with Tooltips & Insecure SSL Option
body: This epic covers the addition of help tooltips (hover-over icons) to the Client UI, the addition of an explicit `insecure_skip_verify` configuration property to bypass TLS on local targets, and fixing the Host header rewrite logic for local proxying.

issues.title: Add InsecureSkipVerify option to configuration and Client Engine
issues.body: Add a boolean flag `InsecureSkipVerify` to the ClientConfig struct and expose it as a checkbox in the inspector HTML to bypass TLS certificate checking when connecting to local HTTPS targets (e.g., LDM on 443). Update the `interceptor.go` proxy to respect this new flag instead of checking unconditionally.

issues.title: Fix PreserveHost rewrite logic to support localhost rewrites
issues.body: Remove the hardcoded exception in `interceptor.go` that skips Host rewriting when the target is `localhost`. If `PreserveHost` is unchecked, it should strictly rewrite to `Local Target Host`, even if it is `localhost`.

issues.title: Add descriptive help tooltips to all Configuration fields
issues.body: Inject `?` hover-over icons with descriptive `title` attributes next to each configuration label in `inspector.html` to help users understand what `Preserve incoming Host header`, `Server URL`, and other fields do.
